description_long: This object is a simple wooden guard rail composed of four thick, rectangular beams arranged in a rectangular frame with one diagonal support beam. The two vertical posts are positioned at the ends, while two horizontal rails connect them, with the upper rail slightly offset. The diagonal beam runs from the lower left to the upper right, providing structural reinforcement. The wood appears to be uniformly colored with a matte brown finish, and the ends of the beams are blunt and squared off. There are no visible fasteners, reflective markings, or decorative elements, giving it a utilitarian appearance suitable for temporary or rustic urban barriers.
description: A basic wooden guard rail with a rectangular frame, two vertical posts, two horizontal rails, and a diagonal support beam, all in matte brown.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular frame, both vertical posts, two horizontal rails, and the diagonal support beam.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the guard rail, with the thickness of the beams visible and minimal detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the same structural elements as the front, with the diagonal beam slanting in the opposite direction.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the alignment of the beams.
